# utils.visualization.generate_vtu { #skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtu }

`utils.visualization.generate_vtu`



## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [save_vtu_point_vertexsample](#skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_point_vertexsample) | U: (n_steps, ndofs_P2) |
| [save_vtu_time_series_point](#skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_time_series_point) | Write point-data frames to VTK on an undeformed mesh. |
| [save_vtu_time_series_point_vertexsample](#skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_time_series_point_vertexsample) | U: (n_steps, ndofs_P2) |

### save_vtu_point_vertexsample { #skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_point_vertexsample }

```python
utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_point_vertexsample(
    U,
    mesh,
    basis,
    run_dir,
    fname,
    point_data_name='Temperature',
)
```

U: (n_steps, ndofs_P2)
Saves vertex-sampled field (n_vertices,) on the original mesh.

### save_vtu_time_series_point { #skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_time_series_point }

```python
utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_time_series_point(
    U,
    mesh,
    run_dir,
    prefix,
    interval=10,
    point_data_name='Temperature',
)
```

Write point-data frames to VTK on an undeformed mesh.

The function writes frames named ``{prefix}_{k:04d}.vtk`` with a point-data
array stored under ``point_data_name``.

The time axis handling is:
- if ``U.shape[0] == n_points``: treat U as (n_points, n_steps) and save columns
- else: treat U as (n_steps, n_points) and save rows

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name            | Type          | Description                                                               | Default         |
|-----------------|---------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------|
| U               | numpy.ndarray | Point-data history with shape (n_steps, n_points) or (n_points, n_steps). | _required_      |
| mesh            | object        | Mesh object that provides ``save(path, point_data=...)``.                 | _required_      |
| run_dir         | pathlib.Path  | Output directory.                                                         | _required_      |
| prefix          | str           | Base name used for VTU frames.                                            | _required_      |
| interval        | int           | Save every ``interval`` steps. Default is 10.                             | `10`            |
| point_data_name | str           | Key used in VTK point_data. Default is "Temperature".                     | `'Temperature'` |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description   |
|--------|--------|---------------|
|        | None   |               |

#### Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

Authors: Suparno Bhattacharyya

### save_vtu_time_series_point_vertexsample { #skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_time_series_point_vertexsample }

```python
utils.visualization.generate_vtu.save_vtu_time_series_point_vertexsample(
    U,
    mesh,
    basis,
    run_dir,
    prefix,
    interval=8,
    point_data_name='Temperature',
)
```

U: (n_steps, ndofs_P2)
Saves vertex-sampled field (n_vertices,) on the original mesh.
